ReleaseNotes: The Session Report now groups the report information into clear treatment-flow sections — Patient / Exam, PREOP Review, Target, Ablation Plan, and Save & Versions — so it is easier to read. The on-screen report, the exported PDF and the printout all show the same layout.

Safer software updates: if another TopoLinkApp window is open, the update now stops and asks you to close it first; and if an update cannot finish, the previous version is restored automatically so the application is never left in a broken state.
Updated user manual (English and Traditional Chinese), including the Exam Review import workflow, session-file export to USB, and first-time setup of the computer validation service.
